name: Cheese and Mushroom Sausages
recipeIngredient: 1 x 212g packet instant mashed potato mix
50 g freshly grated Parmesan cheese, plus
1 tbsp freshly grated Parmesan cheese, to garnish
salt and freshly ground black pepper
peach or spiced fruit chutney -- to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 700ml boiling water into a bowl, then add the potato mix. Stir continuously until combined. Allow to stand for 1 minute, then beat until creamy and smooth. Let cool for 5-10 minutes before handling.
2. Finely chop mushrooms and onions in a food processor. Heat 2 tbsp oil in a large non-stick frying pan. Add the mushroom mixture and cook for 1-2 minutes until just soft. Mix into the potato with the cheese and season well.
3. Divide the mixture into eight portions and shape into large sausages on a floured surface.
4. Wipe the pan with kitchen paper, then heat the remaining oil. Fry the sausages for 4-5 minutes, turning carefully once using a non-stick spatula or palette knife. Ensure not to damage their golden crust.
5. Scatter over the remaining cheese and serve immediately with the chutney, freshly cooked vegetables, or a green salad.
